query: SELECT l.title as lessonTitle, q.question, q.questionType, q.questionOrder FROM quiz_questions q JOIN lessons l ON q.lessonId = l.id WHERE l.courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'NEW_TESTAMENT_SURVEY') ORDER BY l.lessonOrder, q.questionOrder LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.title as lessonTitle, q.question, q.questionType, q.questionOrder FROM quiz_questions q JOIN lessons l ON q.lessonId = l.id WHERE l.courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'NEW_TESTAMENT_SURVEY') ORDER BY l.lessonOrder, q.questionOrder LIMIT 10
